caption: A news anchor wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and maroon tie is seated in a studio, speaking directly to the camera. He wears glasses and is positioned against a blue background featuring a stylized world map and a circular graphic containing the words "PLUS POLITICS." To the left of the anchor is a vertical red banner with the "plustv" logo. A red banner across the bottom of the screen displays the text "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." Below this, a white bar contains a "SUBSCRIBE" button and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA." In the final sequence of the clip, the bottom white bar changes to display "FOLLOW US," a YouTube icon, "PLUSTVAFRICA," and "WATCH ON" with logos for DStv "CH 40in" and StarTimes "CH 308." The anchor's expression and posture remain consistent across the frames as he speaks.
